# Shadowbone Sword
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Shadowbone%20Sword&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Shadowbone Sword
| slot = sword
| tier = ST
| desc = A sword crafted from countless bones collected from the corpses lying around Shadowland.

| rof = 
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 480
| minDmg = 123
| maxDmg = 166
| frequency = 
| shots = 3
| arcgap = 90
| feedp = 500
| fameb = 5

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes

| bonuses = {{Stat|att|4}} {{Stat|vit|2}}

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtainable from the Shadowscale realm event.|range2 = 4.8}}

<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
